meta.siteDescription: Statti pro frontend, web-arkhitekturu ta design systems vid Andrii Pa (@Andersseen).
meta.blogDescription: Tekhnichnyi kontent i notatky z arkhitektury.

home.headline: Tekhnichni statti u moiemu vlasnomu blogi z tym samym vizualnym DNK, shcho i v moiemu portfolio.
home.description: Tsei prostir vidobrazhaie styl Andersseen Dev dlia publikuvannia pro Angular, TypeScript, design systems i frontend arkhitekturu bez zalezhnosti tilky vid Medium.
editorialPoints: Realni eksperymenty z Angular ta Web Components
Pidiody do tooling, DX i yakosti kodu

about.title: Pro tsei proiekt
paragraphs: Tsei blog stvoreno dlia zrostannia bez tertia: vidokremleni shary, striktna typizatsiia, kontrolovanyi hlobalnyi stan i lokalne zberihannia v IndexedDB dlia nalashtuvan ta maibutnikh sesii.
UI pobudovanyi na modularnykh komponentakh Astro, a Angular nalashtovano dlia dynamichnykh islands, koly interaktyvnist diisno daye tsinnist.

blog.latestDescription: Tekhnichnyi kontent i notatky z arkhitektury.
